title: eryngium dorae
intro: Eryngium dorae, also known as the sea holly, is a plant species belonging to the family Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Eryngium dorae is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
